IssueDef.label: infrastructure
IssueDef.description: Roads, railways, and the connections they create.

PreceptDef.label: required
PreceptDef.description: We must build roads and railways to connect our settlements. Successfully completing a road inspires our people based on its quality and length. Failing to do so is a mark of shame.

thoughtStageDescriptions.li: More than {DAYSSINCELASTROADTHRESHOLD} days since our last road was built
